rationale: Both papers are centrally about consumer variety seeking, and the cited 2019 article contributes a concrete antecedent/mechanism (sleepiness via need for arousal) that plausibly functions as substantive prior theory for the citing paper’s stated goal of extending variety-seeking research. With this strong construct overlap and no direct evidence that the citation is purely perfunctory (only a DOI match, no in-text context), it is not safe to drop as obvious mention-only.
